proposed_base_material_variables.alloy_equivalency_numbers: Calculated compositional metrics, such as Chromium equivalent or Nickel equivalent, used to theoretically predict phase balances (e.g., ferrite vs. austenite boundaries) based on the bulk chemical composition.

proposed_conditioned_material_variables.crevice_mitigation_strategy: The specific techniques or barrier materials (e.g., applying a thin film of lacquer at the specimen/epoxy mount interface) used to prevent artificial crevice corrosion from prematurely initiating and masking the true pitting potential.

proposed_experiment_variables.repassivation_potential: The explicitly measured protection potential (Ep) at which the reverse anodic scan intersects the forward scan during cyclic polarization, indicating the potential where actively growing pits repassivate.
proposed_experiment_variables.passive_current_density: The measured steady-state anodic current density (ipassive) exhibited by the material within its passive potential region prior to localized breakdown.
proposed_experiment_variables.pitting_current_density_threshold: The specific anodic current density value (e.g., in µA/cm²) used by the researchers as the explicit mathematical or visual criterion to define the exact onset of the critical pitting potential (Ec).
proposed_experiment_variables.polarization_scan_reversal_criteria: The predefined threshold (either a specific current density limit or maximum vertex potential) at which the forward anodic scan is reversed to evaluate hysteresis and localized corrosion propagation.
proposed_experiment_variables.hysteresis_charge_flow: The integrated electric charge (measured in coulombs) representing the area within the hysteresis loop during a reversed cyclic polarization scan, used to quantify the extent of localized corrosion propagation.
proposed_experiment_variables.electrochemical_instrumentation: The specific make, model, and hardware/software configuration of the potentiostat (e.g., PAR Model 350, microprocessor-controlled) used to conduct the electrochemical tests and calculate polarization parameters.
